pressArticles.excerpt: The new EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain promises to deliver unprecedented performance while maintaining full compatibility with existing Ethereum tooling and infrastructure.
pressArticles.headline: Liberty Chain Launches with 10,000+ TPS and Zero Gas Fees, Challenging Ethereum's Dominance

roadmapMilestones.title: Genesis Block
roadmapMilestones.description: Liberty Chain mainnet launches with 10,000+ TPS and zero gas fees. The foundation of a new decentralized era is laid — EVM-compatible from day one.

roadmapMilestones.title: DeFi Foundation
roadmapMilestones.description: The first wave of DeFi protocols deploy on Liberty Chain. Zero-fee swaps, overcollateralized lending, and yield farming go live across the ecosystem.

roadmapMilestones.title: Developer Ecosystem
roadmapMilestones.description: SDK releases, the Liberty Grants Program launches, and developer tooling reaches 1,000+ active builders. The open-source community takes shape.

roadmapMilestones.title: Cross-Chain Bridge
roadmapMilestones.description: Native bridge enables seamless asset transfers between Liberty Chain, Ethereum, and 10+ EVM-compatible networks with sub-second finality.

roadmapMilestones.title: On-Chain Governance
roadmapMilestones.description: Community-driven governance goes live. Token holders vote on protocol upgrades, treasury allocation, and ecosystem grants — fully on-chain.

roadmapMilestones.title: Mobile & Mesh
roadmapMilestones.description: Full mobile node support with Meshtastic integration. Run Liberty Chain on mesh radio networks — no internet connection required.

roadmapMilestones.title: Global Adoption
roadmapMilestones.description: Enterprise partnerships, institutional integrations, and 10M+ active wallets mark Liberty Chain's emergence as a leading global Layer 1 blockchain.

forumTopics.title: Welcome to the Liberty Chain Forum!
Getting started with Liberty Chain smart contracts
[Proposal] Reduce validator minimum stake to 10,000 LC

forumPosts.content:
## Welcome!

This is the official Liberty Chain community forum.

Here you can:
- **Discuss** governance proposals
- **Ask** technical questions
- **Share** ecosystem updates
- **Connect** with fellow community members

Please keep discussions respectful and on-topic. See you in the threads!

## Summary

This proposal suggests reducing the minimum validator stake from **50,000 LC** to **10,000 LC** to increase decentralization and allow more community members to participate in network security.

## Motivation

Currently only large token holders can run validators. By lowering the minimum stake:

1. More validators = greater decentralization
2. Community members with modest holdings can participate
3. Network becomes more resilient to outages

## Implementation

This would require a protocol upgrade scheduled for Q2 2026.

**Please vote below and leave your thoughts!**
